description.value:
Sunlit prayer-knotwork copied by shrine-smiths — Ljósamál shrine-smiths work only at midday, etching solar knotwork into armor using focused light rather than fire; the resulting filigree stores warmth that pushes back corruption.

Effect: Once per respite, when you would take corruption damage, you gain corruption immunity 5 until the end of the encounter and shed faint light for the same duration.

Rules: Damage Immunity; Encounter; Respite.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least quality craft; a sheet of goldleaf blessed at a Ljósamál shrine
